results.description: U.S. Mint to Release First Non-Circular Coin in Modern History to Honor America’s 250th Anniversary, AzerNEWS reports.

results.title: State Sen. Larry Selders dies, he authored Louisiana's Juneteenth holiday and expanded school mental health access
results.description: BATON ROUGE — Louisiana State Sen. Larry Selders died suddenly Tuesday night at the age of 44 after collapsing at an event. The news drew an outpouring of remembrance from a politically diverse group of colleagues. They described Selders as a passionate and reliable representative for his constituents. Selders, a Baton Rouge native, was elected to represent the capital city in the state Senate in 2025. He filled the vacancy left behind when Cleo Fields won the Sixth U.S. Congressional seat. As a social worker and state senator, Selders championed access to mental health care. He also owned and directed a substance abuse and mental health clinic. Because of his work, school districts can now offer mental health screenings and provide additional resources to students. It's something Selders told WBRZ in an interview in 2025 would help communities across the state. "I think this is a good step for Louisiana," Selders said at the time. State Rep. C. Denise Marcelle reflected on the kind of person Selders was behind the scenes. "He didn't like audiences. He didn't like being out front, but he did like fighting for people," Marcelle said. In 2021, Selders authored the bill that designated Juneteenth as a holiday officially recognized by the state. State Rep. Edmond Jordan said Selders leaves behind a record worth honoring. "He has a legislative record that he and his family can be proud of," Jordan said. Jordan also said Selders will be remembered beyond his role at the Capitol. "The thing to me is remembering the type of family man he was, dedicated to his sons," Jordan said. Selders is survived by his sons, Larry and Luke, and his widow, Dr. Kendra Michael. “Even though he had a short life, he did a lot in that short life," Marcelle said. Funeral arrangements for Selders have not been announced publicly at this time. Permalink | Comments

results.title: Patagonia, Roper Lake named Arizona's top beaches
results.description: SAFFORD — Arizona may be hundreds of miles from the ocean, but two of its state park swim beaches have earned national recognition for something every beachgoer can appreciate: good manners.

results.title: St. Peters's sizzles through 60th annual art show
results.description: Joan Rumenap and Jayne Barnhardt made their way around the 60th annual St. Peter's Art Show trying to stay cool, but looking for hot bargains. "We definitely made some purchases," Rumenap said. She showed off note cards with sailboats and wood from old furniture repurposed into a coat rack. They were among the patrons who spent part of July Fourth checking out works from painters, metalworkers and jewelrymakers.

results.title: Combat evolved: How data is taking over warfighting for the U.S. military
results.description: Wrestling with massive amounts of data will define modern warfare as much as battling the enemy. Inside the defense industry, companies are locked in a highly competitive race to build cutting-edge tools designed to bring secure, artificial intelligence-powered decision aids and communications to combat. results.title: Memes Pairing Lionel Messi And Gianni Infantino Spread Like Wildfire Online Amid World Cup Controversies
results.description: Lionel Messi and Gianni Infantino Memes, also known as Lionel Messi and FIFA President Meme, refer to a series of jokes and memes that portray Argentinian football (soccer) star Lionel Messi and FIFA President Gianni Infantino in a romantic relationship or extremely close friendship, usually with heavy exaggeration and absurdity. The memes are based on conspiracy theories that Infantino and FIFA are biased toward Messi and the Argentinian men's national team, rigging matches and tournaments in their favor to help them win. The memes pairing the two largely began appearing online during the 2022 FIFA World Cup in Qatar, which Argentina won, and became more prominent on social media during the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico and the U.S.

results.title: Treasury Yields Tick Higher on Reignited Iran-Related Inflation
Inflow Technologies Partners with Orca Security to Enhance Cloud Security in India
results.description: Bengaluru (Karnataka) [India], July 8: Inflow Technologies, a leading value-added distributor of ICT infrastructure solutions, has partnered with Orca Security, the pioneer of agentless cloud security. The collaboration brings together Inflow's strong regional presence with Orca Security's AI-powered Cloud-Native Application Protection Platform (CNAPP) to help organisations improve visibility and security across cloud environments.
